---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality or a design change.
title: ""
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What's missing or awkward today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see instead.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't pick them.

## Does this touch the compliance-module interface?

If this changes the shared `is_transfer_allowed` interface, what triggers a
rejection, or how on-chain/off-chain state stay in sync — say so explicitly
and reference `docs/RFC.md`.
